creator: grog@lemis.de
text:
'make install' doesn't create /usr/libdata tcl if it doesn't
	exist.  The error message doesn't help much, either:

	===> lib/libtcl
	install -C -o bin -g bin -m 444  /src/FREEBIE/lib/libtcl/../../contrib/tcl/generic/tcl.h /usr/include
	install -c -o bin -g bin -m 444  /src/FREEBIE/lib/libtcl/../../contrib/tcl/library/[a-z]* /usr/libdata/tcl
	usage: install [-CcDps] [-f flags] [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] file1 file2
	       install [-CcDps] [-f flags] [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] file1 ...
	             fileN directory
	       install -d [-g group] [-m mode] [-o owner] directory ...
	*** Error code 64


Greg
